title: carpinus polyneura var. sunpanensis
intro: Carpinus polyneura var. sunpanensis, also known as the Chinese hornbeam, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carpinus polyneura var. sunpanensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and cough. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat various health conditions.
